001package net.okocraft.box.feature.category.model;
002
003import net.kyori.adventure.text.TranslatableComponent;
004import net.okocraft.box.api.model.item.BoxItem;
005import org.bukkit.Material;
006import org.jetbrains.annotations.NotNull;
007import org.jetbrains.annotations.Unmodifiable;
008
009import java.util.List;
010
011public interface Category {
012
013    @NotNull String getName();
014
015    @NotNull TranslatableComponent getDisplayName();
016
017    @NotNull Material getIconMaterial();
018
019    @NotNull @Unmodifiable List<BoxItem> getItems();
020}
